title: Chunked Transfer Coding, Extensions, Trailers, and Decoding · Language Lens: Trailer Field Policy
summary: A decoder parses chunk sizes as decimal, trusts extensions, misses overflow, forgets the zero chunk, merges forbidden trailers into headers, and leaves bytes misaligned. Planned artifact: Add and verify the trailer field policy increment in incremental chunked decoder and trailer policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Validate trailer declarations and forbidden fields, retain trailers separately, and merge only when the field definition explicitly permits.
Treat the last zero-sized chunk as the transition to trailer parsing rather than immediate message completion.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Trailer Field Policy · Theory Trailer Field Policy
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory protocol team handles case 7305 in a canary edge service advertising HTTP/3 with bounded fallback. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound chunk accumulation and require trailer validation after the zero chunk; preserve this operating constraint: all attacker-controlled counts must be validated before allocation or slicing; then reject a protocol transition while optimistic bytes are buffered and prevent desynchronization. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only. Sockets, listeners, live TLS, proxies, packet capture, fuzz campaigns, races, load, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Trailer Field Policy contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Trailer Field Policy · Theory Trailer Field Policy.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for validate trailer declarations and forbidden fields, retain trailers separately, and merge only when the field definition explicitly permits. For Predict Trailer Field Policy · Theory Trailer Field Policy, keep Trailer Field Policy connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
